title: AudioShuttle - Voice-Controlled Professional Music Production
description:
AudioShuttle: Voice-controlled DAW for motor-impaired musicians (Digital Equity & Inclusivity track)

## What It Is
AudioShuttle bridges natural language voice commands to REAPER DAW using Gemma 4 E4B as a domain expert translator. For the first time, motor-impaired musicians can create full professional arrangements without touching a mouse or keyboard.

## Why Gemma 4 E4B
- 81K context: fits entire genre profile + tool schema in one prompt
- Tool-use: multi-step DAW orchestration with state verification  
- Domain expertise: understands music concepts (chorus, solo, bus routing)

## Verified Working
- E2E test: "create a rock project called Midnight Drive at 130 BPM" -> 8 tracks + 9 markers + 130 BPM in ~45 seconds
- Full Docker stack with GPU acceleration (AMD ROCm, RX 6950 XT)
- 11 genres, 40+ DAW operations, 9-step orchestration pipeline

## Impact
- 250M+ people with motor impairments cannot use traditional DAW workflows
- This is the first hands-free professional music production tool
- MIT licensed, AI-agnostic design

## Repository
https://github.com/carlkrott/audioshuttle
